items.title: EU tech chief and Apple CEO had a constructive talk on topics of common interest
items.summary: 유럽 ​​기술 위원회 대변인은 Henna Virkkunen이 월요일에 열린 화상 통화에서 Tim Cook Apple CEO와 "건설적인" 대화를 나눴다고 말했습니다. 그들은 작업이 계속되는 "공통 관심사 주제"에 대해 이야기했다고 ⁠대변인은 수요일에 덧붙였습니다. iPhone 제조업체는 자사의 Siri AI가 처음에는 iPhone이나 iPad에서 EU에서 사용할 수 없을 것이라고 밝혔으며, 유럽 위원회가 기기의 개인 정보 보호와 보안을 보장하기 위해 건설적인 참여를 거부한 것에 대해 비난했으며, 위원회는 Apple이 EU 표준을 충족하는 "상호 운용성"을 개발할 수 없었다고 비난했습니다.
items.summaryOriginal: European Technology Commissioner Henna ‌Virkkunen had a "constructive" talk ‌with Apple's Chief Executive Tim Cook ​during a video call held on Monday, said a Commission spokesperson. They spoke ‌about "topics of ⁠common interest" on which work continues, the ⁠spokesperson added on Wednesday. The iPhone maker has said ​its Siri ​AI would ​not be ‌available initially in the EU on iPhones or iPads and faulted the European Commission for refusing to engage ‌constructively with ​them to ensure ​privacy ​and security on ‌their devices, while the ​Commission ​blamed Apple, saying the company had been unable to ​develop "interoperability" ‌to meet EU standards.

items.titleOriginal: South Korea’s Exports Surge by Most Since 1978 on Red-Hot Demand for Chips
items.summaryOriginal: The June trade result comes on the heels of an announcement by the South Korean government and top memory-chip makers Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix to invest trillions of dollars to deepen the country’s role in the semiconductor supply chain, and fend off competition from U.S. and Chinese rivals. Imports expanded 30.1% to $66.10 billion last month, resulting in a trade surplus of $36.15 billion and surpassing the $30 billion threshold for the first time. Semiconductors remained the main drivers of shipment growth, the trade ministry said, with chip exports reaching a new monthly record of $44.82 billion in June.

items.summaryOriginal: European Technology Commissioner Henna ‌Virkkunen had a "constructive" talk ‌with Apple's Chief Executive Tim Cook ​during a video call held on Monday, said a Commission spokesperson. They spoke ‌about "topics of ⁠common interest" on which work continues, the ⁠spokesperson added on Wednesday. The iPhone maker has said ​its Siri ​AI would ​not be ‌available initially in the EU on iPhones or iPads and faulted the European Commission for refusing to engage ‌constructively with ​them to ensure ​privacy ​and security on ‌their devices, while the ​Commission ​blamed Apple, saying the company had been unable to ​develop "interoperability" ‌to meet EU standards.

items.title: Genpact (G) Launches AI Deductions Recovery Tool For Consumer Goods Companies
items.summary: Genpact(NYSE:G)는 소비재 회사를 위한 AI 기반 공제 복구 솔루션을 출시했습니다. 이 플랫폼은 Microsoft Azure 및 특수 AI 에이전트를 사용하여 공제 관리 및 복구 프로세스를 자동화합니다. 이 서비스는 수익 누수, 규정 준수 요구 사항 및 거래 공제 시 수동 작업량을 해결하도록 설계되었습니다. Genpact는 주가가 27.5달러로 전년 대비 40.1% 하락하고 37.7% 이상 하락하는 등 주가가 지속적으로 압박을 받고 있는 시기에 이 솔루션을 출시하고 있습니다.
items.summaryOriginal: Genpact (NYSE:G) has launched an AI powered Deductions Recovery solution for consumer goods companies. The platform uses Microsoft Azure and specialized AI agents to automate deduction management and recovery processes. The offering is designed to address revenue leakage, compliance needs, and manual workload in trade deductions.
